text.title: LLM Drift Daily Triage Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for triage-report.json: date, deltas, failing traces, decision, owner.

example.note: Fails: missing deltas + failing_traces; owner generic; decision not in enum.

list.item: owner is a single named person, not "team" or "us".
deltas object has all three keys.
failing_traces has 0-3 entries, each with id+summary+expected+got.
If decision = escalate, follow_up is non-empty.
